meaning: n.[纺]有印花之轻质毛料,印花丝毛料
examples: Acting manager Mark Challis said Belfast Zoo was establishing an excellent reputation for the breeding of leaf eating monkeys.
Zoo manager Mark Challis said the coati was in good health.
Erica Challis, a musician by profession and one of the producers of a major fan website, has turned her passion for Tolkien into a potential business.
